\tzpentry{ID5510}{Curvature Expectation Value}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5510 introduces Curvature Expectation Value as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} R_{11}=\left|\left\langle e^{i(\phi-\theta)}\right\rangle\right|, \qquad R_{32}=\left|\left\langle e^{i(2\phi-3\theta)}\right\rangle\right|. \label{eq:order_params} \end{equation}
